items.title: Andy Burnham becomes British PM, provides AUKUS hints in first speech

children.content: Andy Burnham has pledged to provide immediate cost-of-living relief for Brits and "do politics differently" in his first speech after becoming prime minister on Monday.

items.title: New Delhi police clash with protesters as thousands rally for 'cockroach' movement

items.title: Hundreds march on secretive facility Pine Gap in biggest protest since 1980s

children.content: About 300 people have marched on Pine Gap in Alice Springs, protesting against its role in US military operations, in the largest protest at the top-secret defence site since 1987.

items.title: Telehealth ban still standing between dying patients and their doctors

children.content: A federal law which threatens doctors if they use electronic communications, such as the internet or phone, to discuss voluntary assisted dying remains in force, even though telehealth is now an established part of healthcare.
